project.name: Project Iron Ingot (UCC INGO)
project.organization: University of Caloocan City - Computer Science Council
project.tagline: Your CS Information Board on the Go.
project.description: Public-facing website for the UCC CS Council (INGO). Surfaces BSCS program news, awards, theses, blogs, bulletins, and council/team info. Content managed in a Sanity Studio v3 bundled inside the repo.
project.maintainers: UCC Computer Science Council Dev Team

devCommands.npm run dev: Start Next.js (3000) AND Sanity Studio (3333) concurrently
devCommands.npm run dev:studio: Start only Sanity Studio on :3333 (sanity dev)

overallStatus.phase1: completed — critical/high bugs fixed, site renders Sanity data without crashes
overallStatus.phase2: completed — council section, mobile responsiveness, SEO, animations
overallStatus.phase3: completed — Sanity v2→v3 migration, env setup, AGENTS.md handoff, README overhaul
overallStatus.phase4: in progress — 3 sub-phases (4.1 ✅ done, 4.2 ✅ done, 4.3 ⏳ pending)

14f7005 — phase 4.1.2: add production preview URLs to studio config
f93d3cf — phase 4.1.3: add field groups to thesis and award schemas
8eacc29 — phase 4.1.4: simplify recipient schema from 273 to 80 lines
ea247cd — phase 4.1.5: add initial value templates, preview configs, and newest-first ordering
6594849 — phase 4.1.6: add dev and deploy scripts to studio package.json

tasks.name: Restructure desk sidebar with logical groupings
Add production preview URLs to studio config
Add field groups to complex schemas
Simplify over-engineered schemas
Add document badges and initial value templates
Add missing dev script and studio improvements

4.2.title: Presentation Layer & Schema Polish
4.2.summary: Tasks 4.2.1 committed. Tasks 4.2.2–4.2.4 implemented but NOT YET COMMITTED. Task 4.2.5 pending.
commits: 03b6b04 — phase 4.2.1: fix author preview to show full name and photo
uncommitted: phase 4.2.2: rewrite awards/[slug].js — removed demo mode, validation bloat, sample data. 966→250 lines.
phase 4.2.3: add getStaticProps with ISR to all 5 list pages (awards, blog, bulletin, thesis, gallery)
phase 4.2.3: extract awards GROQ queries to lib/groq/awards.js
phase 4.2.4: audit unused imports — all clean

tasks.name: Add custom preview components for Studio documents
tasks.note: Fixed author preview to show fullName (firstName + lastName) and authorPhoto instead of raw document IDs

tasks.name: Optimize awards page (remove dead code, simplify)
tasks.details: Removed: validateImage(), handleImageError(), demo mode flag, sample awards data, schema validation constants (ValidationError enum, AwardValidationSchema, sanitizeContent, validateAwardData, validateField, validateSanityData), generateSampleAwardData(), demo Effect blocks. Reduced from 966 to 250 lines. Kept: getStaticProps/getStaticPaths with error handling, breadcrumbs, PortableText with blockComponents, recipient grid, SEO Head, scroll-to-top, date formatting via dayjs.

tasks.name: Add server-side data fetching to list pages
tasks.details: Added getStaticProps with revalidate: 10 to all 5 index pages. Uses initialData props for SSR (eliminates first-load loading spinner). Blog/bulletin/thesis/gallery still sync from Prefetcher (guarded by .length > 0 to avoid empty-state override). Awards page no longer does client.fetch() — uses SSR data exclusively. Each page has its own GROQ query inlined (separate PRD task 4.3.9 will extract all to lib/groq/).

tasks.name: Add order-by and filter defaults to Studio lists
tasks.note: Default ordering (newest first) was configured in all document type lists during 4.1.5

tasks.name: Sanity Studio document preview components
tasks.details: Add preview: { select: { title, subtitle, media } } to each schema using meaningful field mappings. For blog -> title: blogTitle, subtitle: academicYear, media: headerImage. For thesis -> title: thesisTitle, subtitle: department + ' · ' + academicYear, media: headerImage. For person types -> title: fullName, subtitle: yearLevel + ' · Batch ' + batchYear, media: photo.

4.3.title: Live Content Updates (No Page Refresh)
4.3.summary: Implement on-demand ISR via Sanity webhooks so published content refreshes instantly. Add a client-side content listener for real-time updates. Replace the blocking Prefetcher with a stale-while-revalidate pattern. Consolidate caching.
4.3.explanation: Shared cache (4.3.1) is needed first because 4.3.6 depends on it. Client listener (4.3.4) and SWR Prefetcher (4.3.5) can be built before webhooks since they're client-side. Webhook receiver (4.3.2) comes before studio action (4.3.3). GROQ extraction (4.3.9) and error boundaries (4.3.10) can be done last since they're additive.

tasks.name: Create shared caching utility
tasks.details: Create lib/cache.js exporting createCache(config?) with: get(key), set(key, value, ttl?), invalidate(key), invalidateAll(). Uses Map internally, defaults to 5-min TTL. Refactor siteConfig.js to use shared cache for SITE_CONFIG_QUERY result. Refactor pages/api/chat.js to use shared cache for site context and thesis embeddings.
tasks.commitMessage: phase 4.3.1: create shared lib/cache.js and refactor siteConfig + chat to use it

tasks.name: Create Sanity webhook receiver API route
tasks.details: Create pages/api/revalidate.js. POST-only endpoint. Verify webhook signature using SANITY_API_TOKEN from env. Extract _type and slug from request body. Use Next.js 15's revalidatePath() and revalidateTag() to purge ISR cache. Return 200. Log actions. Handle errors gracefully without exposing internals.
tasks.commitMessage: phase 4.3.2: create /api/revalidate webhook receiver for on-demand ISR

tasks.name: Configure Sanity webhook in desk structure
tasks.details: Create studio/documentActions.js that exports a custom document action. On 'publish' and 'unpublish' transitions, POST to NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL/api/revalidate with document _type and slug. Register the action in sanity.config.js plugins array.
tasks.commitMessage: phase 4.3.3: add custom document action to fire webhooks on publish/unpublish

tasks.name: Add client-side content listener for real-time updates
tasks.details: Add listenSanity() to lib/sanity.js wrapping client.listen('*'). In Prefetcher.js, add useEffect that subscribes to mutations. When a mutation fires, invalidate the related cache entry and refetch only that content type. Disconnect listener on unmount and when tab is hidden (visibilitychange).
tasks.commitMessage: phase 4.3.4: add client.listen() subscription for real-time content updates

tasks.name: Replace Prefetcher with stale-while-revalidate pattern
tasks.details: Replace useState/useEffect with a custom useSWR-style hook. Show cached/initial data immediately, initiate background refetch, update when new data arrives. Remove the 'loaded' blocking state and the full-screen loading overlay. Add individual loading states per content type. The context consumers handle their own loading/empty states.
tasks.commitMessage: phase 4.3.5: replace blocking Prefetcher with SWR pattern, remove loading overlay

tasks.name: Consolidate chatbot caching with shared utility
tasks.details: Replace the inline 5-min TTL cache in chat.js with calls to shared lib/cache.js. Expose invalidateSiteContext() and invalidateThesesCache() for webhook-triggered invalidation.
tasks.commitMessage: phase 4.3.6: refactor chatbot to use shared cache with webhook invalidation

tasks.name: Add ISR tags to all getStaticProps paths
tasks.details: Add revalidate tags to all getStaticProps functions. Export const revalidateTags = ['blog', 'bulletin', 'thesis', 'award', 'gallery'] from each page. The webhook receiver uses revalidateTag() for targeted purging.
tasks.commitMessage: phase 4.3.7: add ISR tags to all getStaticProps for targeted revalidation

tasks.name: Add Presentation tool to Sanity Studio
tasks.details: npm install @sanity/presentation in studio/. Add presentation() plugin to sanity.config.js with previewUrl pointing to NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL. Configure resolvers for each document type mapping slugs to URLs. This enables visual live editing — editors click elements on a website preview to edit them in Studio.
tasks.commitMessage: phase 4.3.8: install and configure @sanity/presentation for visual live editing

tasks.name: Add GROQ query files for maintainability
tasks.details: Create lib/groq/blog.js, bulletin.js, thesis.js, awards.js (done), gallery.js, council.js, devTeam.js, siteConfig.js. Each exports named query strings. Update Prefetcher.js and all pages to import from lib/groq/. Note: awards.js already created in 4.2.3.
tasks.commitMessage: phase 4.3.9: extract all GROQ queries to lib/groq/ files

tasks.name: Add error boundaries and error handling
tasks.details: Create components/ErrorBoundary.js. Wrap major page sections. Add try/catch in all client.fetch calls in lib/sanity.js. In Prefetcher, catch individual fetch errors so one failing type doesn't block others.
tasks.commitMessage: phase 4.3.10: add ErrorBoundary component and error handling to all Sanity fetches

commitPlan.strategy: One commit per task with a descriptive message prefixed by phase ID. This ensures a rich commit history with clear traceability.

root: groq (tagged template literal for GROQ queries)

current.prefetcher: Client-side context loads all content on mount. Blocking loading overlay. No caching.
current.ssg: Detail pages use getStaticProps + getStaticPaths with revalidate: 10.
current.listPages: Fully client-rendered via Prefetcher. No server-side data.
current.updates: Content changes take up to 10 seconds to appear. Manual page reload required.

target.prefetcher: Stale-while-revalidate pattern. Instant cache-first load, background refresh. No blocking overlay.
target.ssg: Detail pages use getStaticProps + revalidateTag. On-demand revalidation via webhooks.
target.listPages: getStaticProps with ISR + client-side hydration. First load is instant from server.
target.updates: Sanity webhooks trigger on-demand ISR instantly. Client listener updates UI without reload.
target.caching: Shared lib/cache.js with configurable TTL, manual invalidation, used by all services.

required.name: SANITY_API_TOKEN
required.purpose: Read token for dataset access and webhook verification

required.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
required.purpose: Google Gemini API key for CSBot

addedInPhase4.name: SANITY_WEBHOOK_SECRET
addedInPhase4.purpose: Secret for verifying Sanity webhook payloads

addedInPhase4.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL
addedInPhase4.purpose: Base URL for production preview URLs in Studio

risks.risk: Sanity presentation tool may require newer @sanity/presentation version
risks.mitigation: Check compatibility with current sanity ^3.76.0 before installing. Fall back to basic preview URLs if incompatible.

risks.risk: Client.listen() consumes API quota on large datasets
risks.mitigation: Filter listener query to only relevant document types. Disconnect listener when window/tab is hidden.

risks.risk: Sanity webhook receiver could be exploited if not properly secured
risks.mitigation: Validate webhook signature using SANITY_API_TOKEN or dedicated webhook secret. Use POST-only endpoint. Rate-limit incoming requests.

risks.risk: Server-side list pages increase build time
risks.mitigation: Use fallback: 'blocking' so unbuilt pages render on first request. Keep revalidate for incremental regeneration.
